ddls:
CREATE TABLE "balance_sheet_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each balance sheet item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the balance sheet item (e.g., Cash & Short-Term Investments, Accounts Receivable) */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Description of the balance sheet item */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the item (e.g., balance sheet, income statement) */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of the item (e.g., asset, liability, equity, revenue, expense) */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is based */,
  "fiscal_year_start_month" INTEGER /* Month in which the company's fiscal year starts (1-12) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used by the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company's website */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial data point */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the data belongs to */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the balance sheet item the data represents */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was reported */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter of the year (1-4) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Specific date the data was reported */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the balance sheet item for the given year and quarter */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the financial data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the data point */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES balance_sheet_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial analyst, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
